finding: Multiple ATM operations required the operator to query CLI help or source code for basic usage, including framework-mode release actor-only surface, broker release syntax, lane continuation env, and commit fallback env.
expectedBehavior: First-layer ATM skills should expose common recovery and lifecycle command surfaces directly, especially commands needed during taskflow, runner-sync, broker release, lane adoption, and governed git fallback.
evidenceOrRepro: Dogfood observations during ATM-GOV-0195 and adjacent work: framework-mode release did not accept --task; broker release / runner-sync release required exact actor/steward syntax; lane continuation needed ATM_LANE_SESSION_ID; hook fallback needed ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID.
followUp: Create a skill-source repair task to add a compact command surface table and Windows-safe examples to the relevant ATM skills.
